description_zh: 健康的橘色虎斑猫,1-3岁,毛发光亮眼神有神
description_en: Healthy orange tabby, 1-3yo, glossy coat and bright eyes

expectations.rationale: bright clear eyes visible in photo
no urgent issues for a healthy cat
no urgent flag for healthy cat

qualitative_criteria_zh: 报告应该明确肯定健康状况(不是泛泛的'看起来不错')
对眼神/毛发/姿态至少给出一处具体观察
建议项应该是日常护理(梳毛/玩耍)而非医疗建议
qualitative_criteria_en: Report should explicitly affirm good health (not vague 'looks ok')
At least one specific observation about eyes/fur/posture
Suggestions should be routine care (brushing/play), not medical
